launcher.welcome: Choose a mode to get started
launcher.start_client_desc: Connect to a running CS4S server and browse its files.
launcher.start_server_desc: Host a server that students can connect to.

client.title: CS4S Client
client.connection_error: Could not connect to the server
client.empty_not_connected: Connect to a server to browse its files.

inspector.title: Protocol Inspector
inspector.raw_command_placeholder: Type a raw protocol command (e.g. LIST|path)
inspector.proto_explain_hint_default: Click a command to see its explanation.
inspector.empty_console: Connect and perform an action to see raw protocol traffic.
inspector.proto_explain_unknown: No explanation available for this selection.
inspector.proto_explain_hello: Handshake: negotiates the protocol version before anything else can happen.
inspector.proto_explain_auth: Authentication: sends credentials. Educational note — this protocol sends them in plaintext.
inspector.proto_explain_list: Directory Listing: asks the server for the files in the current path.
inspector.proto_explain_upload: Upload Request: tells the server to prepare for an incoming byte stream.
inspector.proto_explain_download: Download Request: asks the server to start streaming a file's bytes.
inspector.proto_explain_mkdir: Make Directory: creates a new folder inside the user's sandbox.
inspector.proto_explain_delete: Delete: removes a file or folder from the server.
inspector.proto_explain_rename: Rename: changes a file or folder's name in place.
inspector.proto_explain_move: Move: relocates a file into a different directory.
inspector.proto_explain_quit: Disconnect: politely closes the connection before the socket drops.
inspector.proto_explain_ping: Latency Probe: round-trips a tiny message to measure network delay (RTT).
inspector.proto_explain_tls: Encrypted Payload: the application-layer command is no longer visible because it was encrypted by TLS.

server.title: Server — CS4S
server.logs_placeholder: Log activity will appear here once the server starts.
server.empty_clients: No clients are currently connected. Waiting for connections...
server.empty_users: No users configured. The server is rejecting all logins.
server.confirm_force_drop: Immediately close the socket for {addr}? The client will see this as a sudden network failure.

tooltip.disconnect: Send QUIT and close the socket gracefully.
tooltip.refresh: Re-send LIST to refresh the current directory. (Ctrl+R)
tooltip.new_folder: Send MKDIR to create a folder in the current directory. (Ctrl+N)
tooltip.upload: Stream a local file to the server in 4KB chunks. (Ctrl+U)
tooltip.download: Stream a remote file to your disk in 4KB chunks. (Ctrl+D)
tooltip.lab_view_client: Switch to the Protocol Inspector: the raw TX/RX strings behind every action.
tooltip.send_raw: Bypass the GUI: send this exact string as a raw protocol command.
tooltip.inspector_show_ping: Show PING/PONG keepalive packets (used to maintain connection state)
tooltip.start_server: Bind the listening socket and begin accepting connections.
tooltip.stop_server: Stop listening and disconnect every connected client.
tooltip.lab_view_server: Switch to the Connection Graph, Socket States, and Teacher Controls.
tooltip.add_user: Create a new student account in this sandbox.
tooltip.force_drop: Immediately close the selected client's socket, simulating a network failure.
tooltip.simulate_latency: Delay each incoming packet by this many seconds before processing it.
tooltip.simulate_packet_loss: Randomly drop this percentage of incoming packets, simulating a lossy network.
tooltip.rename: Send RENAME to change the name of the selected item.
tooltip.delete: Send DELETE to permanently remove the selected item.
